prompt:
VARIANT A9 — FIVE-BAND SPECTRUM STACK MASTER POSTER (single hero vial per category). A tall portrait poster designed for FINAL 30in × 70in print (3:7 target). Rendered on a 9:16 canvas with INTERNAL SAFETY MARGINS so the design crops cleanly to 30×70 with zero edge clipping.

SAFE-ZONE CANVAS — keep ALL content inside a centered narrow vertical strip:
• 14% pure empty WHITE margin on the LEFT edge
• 14% pure empty WHITE margin on the RIGHT edge
• 5% pure empty WHITE margin on the TOP edge
• 5% pure empty WHITE margin on the BOTTOM edge
Absolutely nothing (no band color, no vial, no text, no logo, no footer, no eyebrow) touches or enters these edge safety zones — they stay flat pure white #FFFFFF for the print bleed/crop. All content lives within the inner 72%-wide × 90%-tall safe area centered on the canvas.

VIAL FIDELITY (CRITICAL) — the five vials in this poster MUST be reproduced PIXEL-FAITHFULLY from the official NuLumin product shot references (REFERENCE IMAGES 2–6). Each band gets ONE single hero vial that IS the corresponding product reference image, preserved exactly: same vial silhouette, same proportions, same clear glass body, same wrap-label format, same 'NuLumin · BIO-SCIENCES' brand bar at the top of the label, same italic BLACK serif product name, same dose in the band's accent color, same 'Manufactured by NuLumin' fine print at the bottom of the label, same metallic screw cap in the band color, same lighting/shading/refraction. Do NOT redraw the vial, do NOT improvise proportions, do NOT modify the label — preserve the product appearance as faithfully as possible.

VERY TOP of the poster (inside the top safe margin, on a white background header strip): the NuLumin Bio-Sciences logo lockup reproduced EXACTLY from REFERENCE IMAGE 1 (the master white-bg logo file). Reproduce pixel-perfectly — same letterforms (multi-colored NU-l-u-m-i-n wordmark with the L–u–m–i–n letters in the brand spectrum colors), same 'BIO-SCIENCES' subtitle in small wide-tracked uppercase navy beneath. Centered horizontally with comfortable space above and below. NO logo distortion, NO color drift.

FIVE HORIZONTAL HERO BANDS stacked top→bottom (each ~17% of the inner safe height), each a saturated radial-gradient color from the NuLumin spectrum palette. Inside each band: the category eyebrow sits on the LEFT side in BOLD WHITE UPPERCASE wide-tracked sans (Libre Franklin, 2 lines stacked, vertically centered). The single hero VIAL sits PERFECTLY HORIZONTALLY CENTERED in the band (NOT pushed right, dead-center on the band's horizontal midline, vertically centered as well). On the RIGHT side, balancing the eyebrow on the left, a category-themed CINEMATIC ATMOSPHERIC GRAPHIC ELEMENT spans softly behind/around the vial as a luminous overlay — a translucent glowing scientific illustration in lighter tints of the band's color that adds depth and theme without overpowering the centered vial. The atmospheric graphic fades softly to the gradient color at the band edges.

BANDS (each: gradient color + atmospheric category graphic + eyebrow LEFT + hero vial CENTER):

1. PURPLE band (deep rich purple #6A2BAF radial gradient). Eyebrow 'TISSUE / RESEARCH'. Hero vial CENTERED = REFERENCE IMAGE 2 (BPC-157 10mg, purple cap) reproduced faithfully. Category graphic: GLOWING TRANSLUCENT MUSCLE-FIBER STRANDS and collagen helix bundles weaving softly behind/around the vial in lighter lilac/lavender tones — tissue-regeneration imagery, soft cinematic.

2. PINK band (hot magenta #DB3A8E radial gradient). Eyebrow 'ENDOCRINE / RESEARCH'. Hero vial CENTERED = REFERENCE IMAGE 3 (Ipamorelin 5mg, pink cap) reproduced faithfully. Category graphic: GLOWING DOUBLE HELIX DNA STRAND and floating hormone-molecule orbs (small spheres connected by faint bond lines) drifting softly around the vial in lighter rose/blush tones — endocrine/molecular imagery.

3. BLUE band (azure #2D90D3 radial gradient). Eyebrow 'CELLULAR / RESEARCH'. Hero vial CENTERED = REFERENCE IMAGE 4 (NAD+ 500mg, blue cap) reproduced faithfully. Category graphic: GLOWING TRANSLUCENT CELL CROSS-SECTIONS — circular cell membranes with luminous internal mitochondria and nuclei — floating softly behind/around the vial in lighter sky/cyan tones.

4. GOLD band (warm amber #DBA32C radial gradient). Eyebrow 'METABOLIC / RESEARCH'. Hero vial CENTERED = REFERENCE IMAGE 5 (GLP-1 10mg, gold cap) reproduced faithfully. Category graphic: GLOWING METABOLIC PATHWAY DIAGRAMS — flowing energy arrows, glucose/ATP molecular icons, branching pathway connectors — drifting softly behind/around the vial in lighter amber/honey tones.

5. GREEN band (emerald #2E9F6E radial gradient). Eyebrow 'NEURAL / RESEARCH'. Hero vial CENTERED = REFERENCE IMAGE 6 (Semax 10mg, green cap) reproduced faithfully. Category graphic: GLOWING NEURONS with branching dendrites and axons firing synaptic light pulses — neural-network imagery — drifting softly behind/around the vial in lighter mint/jade tones.

Each category graphic is CINEMATIC, ATMOSPHERIC, LUMINOUS — NOT a flat illustration, NOT a hard scientific diagram — but a soft glowing depth element that makes each band feel themed and premium. The graphic must NEVER obscure the centered vial or the eyebrow — it lives BEHIND/AROUND them as ambient depth.

VERY BOTTOM (inside the bottom safe margin, on a white-bg footer strip): centered, REFINED COOLER footer treatment. First a thin horizontal SPECTRUM gradient bar (~2px tall, ~25% of inner content width, centered) using the 5 brand band colors in a tight gradient (purple→pink→blue→gold→green). Then below it 'MANUFACTURED BY NULUMIN' in small wide-tracked DEEP NAVY #1A2540 uppercase Libre Franklin (NOT white, NOT pure black). Then below it 'NULUMIN.ORG' in slightly larger DEEP NAVY #1A2540 wide-tracked uppercase Libre Franklin. The URL must say .ORG (not .com).

The hero vial in each band is large enough to read its label CRISPLY (occupies roughly 60% of the band's vertical height). Subtle thin white hairline dividers separate adjacent bands. Photorealistic, clinical, premium, glossy. The whole poster reads like a luxury science-brand campaign artwork.
